summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Angular School ERP application fixes. Major improvements verified: logout functionality fixed, timetable auto-loads Class 8-A data, reports overhauled with 5 detailed tabs, academic promotion workflow working, exams module functional. Session management remains an issue with quick timeouts.

ui_bugs.issue: Sessions expire quickly causing frequent redirects to login page during navigation
Marks table not displaying when exam card is selected

integration_issues.issue: Unable to fully test student profile marks/fees tabs due to session timeouts

passed_tests: Login works with SCH001 / admin@school.com / admin123
Logout functionality FIXED - successfully redirects to login page
Dashboard shows KPI cards: 2,847 students, 124 teachers, $284K fees, 94.2% attendance
Dashboard displays charts for admissions, fee collection, and attendance overview
Timetable auto-loads Class 8 Section A with complete weekly schedule
Timetable shows 5 days with subjects, teachers, and room assignments
Reports page has all 5 tabs: Student Performance, Attendance, Fee Collection, Class Summary, Teacher Workload
Student Performance report shows 7 students with detailed marks, grades, and rankings
Reports contain real student data: Sofia Martinez, Emma Chen, Aiden Murphy, etc.
Exams page shows 4 exam cards with different statuses (completed, upcoming)
Create Exam functionality works with modal form and submission
Students page loads with table containing 21 student profile links
Academic page has 3 tabs with academic years and class promotion workflow
All sidebar navigation items accessible for admin role
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix session management to prevent quick timeouts during navigation. Investigate marks table display issue in exams module when selecting exam cards.
